task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Mercedes-Benz C-Class (Vehicle). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $48450.00 and wholesale is $36800.00. Product features: Luxury sedan with MBUX infotainment system and premium materials. Reference: https://www.mbusa.com/en/vehicles/class/c-class/sedan

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Mercedes-Benz C-Class. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Mercedes-Benz C-Class. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
